channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 basketikun/infinite-canvas (1602 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: basketikun

📝 Repository: basketikun/infinite-canvas

📄 Descrizione: 面向 AI 创作的开源无限画布工作台，集成 AI 生图、参考图编辑、视频生成、Agent 智能助手、画布编排、对话创作、提示词库与素材管理等能力，支持可视化创作流程与多 Agent 协同工作。兼容 OpenAI 接口生态，支持 chatgpt2api、grok2api、flow2api、newapi 等渠道接入。

⭐ Stelle: 1602

🍴 Forks: 388

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-18T23:45:50Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-16T07:16:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: UditAkhourii

📝 Repository: UditAkhourii/adhd

📄 Descrizione: ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Claude & Codex Agent SDK. Fans out parallel divergent thoughts under different cognitive frames, scores, prunes traps, deepens the survivors. The no-brainer skill for creative and interdisciplinary work.

⭐ Stelle: 866

🍴 Forks: 46

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

item.title: 🟦 zenhosta/9drive (578 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zenhosta

📝 Repository: zenhosta/9drive

📄 Descrizione: 9Drive is a storage gateway web app for connecting multiple Google Drive accounts into one virtual storage dashboard. Users can connect Google Drive accounts, track quota, upload files, organize files with virtual folders, preview files, and let the backend route uploads to the Drive account with enough free space.

⭐ Stelle: 578

🍴 Forks: 196

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: drive gateway google storage
